title: Menopause and Insomnia: Why It Happens and What Actually Helps You Sleep
seo_title: Menopause Insomnia: Why It Happens and What Helps
meta_description: Menopause insomnia affects up to 60% of women. Learn the hormonal causes, how hot flashes disrupt sleep, and what actually helps you sleep better during perimenopause.
tags: menopause, insomnia, sleep, hormones, women over 40, magnesium, perimenopause, hot flashes
author: Happy Aging Team
excerpt: Menopause insomnia is not just about hot flashes. Declining progesterone, cortisol shifts, and lower melatonin all play a role. Here is what the research says actually helps you sleep through the transition.
